title: Swap
description: Trade tokens with best execution across 150+ DEXes.

editorial.tagline: Every swap is a small bet on shredding
editorial.body: With the <highlight>Support Gnars treasury</highlight> box ticked, 0.5% of every trade routes straight to the Gnars Collective Treasury — already behind <highlight>15 skatable sculptures</highlight> around the world, ambassador sponsorships, and infrastructure for a network of shredders from across the planet. You're not just swapping tokens; you're backing the culture and funding the next concrete pour, the next contest, the next session.

tokenPicker.dialogDescription: Search by symbol, name, or paste a token contract address.
tokenPicker.noErc20Found: No ERC-20 token found at this address

fee.label: Support Gnars treasury (0.5%)
fee.tooltip: A 0.5% fee on the bought token routes to the Gnars DAO treasury. Helps fund proposals, bounties, and skate infrastructure. Untick to skip.
